chapter_title.en: The Minimum Number of Times One Should Go to the Ziyārah of Ĥusain (a.s.) and the Longest Time Allowed to Delay the Ziyārah for the Wealthy and Poor

text: 4 حَدَّثَنِي جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْمُوسَوِيُّ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ [عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ] بْنِ نَهِيكٍ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنِ الْحَلَبِيِّ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (ع) عَنْ زِيَارَةِ قَبْرِ الْحُسَيْنِ (ص) قَالَ فِي السَّنَةِ مَرَّةً إِنِّي أَكْرَهُ الشُّهْرَةَ

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 4. Ja’far ibn Muḥammad ibn ‘Abdillāh Al-Mūsawi narrated to me from ‘Abdillāh ibn Nahīk, from Ibn Abī ‘Umayr, from Ḥammād, from Al-Ḥalabi, who said: I asked Abā ‘Abdillāh (Imam Sādiq (a.s.)) about the Ziyārah of the grave of Ḥusain (a.s.). Imam (a.s.) said, “(Go) once a year because I do not want you to be identified.”
